summary: Unit tests for RSSSource covering RSS 2.0 and Atom parsing, ETag/Last-Modified conditional request round-trips, 304 handling, checkpoint stability, and text composition priority

observations.text: Compile-time interface assertion consistent with other source test files.

TestRSSSource_FetchMessages_ETagRoundTrip and TestRSSSource_FetchMessages_LastModifiedRoundTrip use a stateful httptest server (requestCount) to simulate a real server's conditional-request flow — more sophisticated than the other source tests.
